description: When a user clicks "Select" on a flight in the search results, nothing happens—they stay on the same page and do not reach the flight detail page.
expectedOutcome: Clicking "Select" on a flight should take the user to that flight's detail page.
hint: A wrapper component receives props that control where the link goes but does not pass them to the element that performs navigation.
symptom: Clicking "Select" on a flight does not navigate; user stays on the search results page.
solution: Forward remaining props from AppLink to the Link component by destructuring ...rest and spreading it onto Link.
